title: zaluzianskia drummondii
intro: Zaluzianskia drummondii, also known as Drummond's cushion or Drummond's zausonia, is a perennial plant species native to North America. It is a member of the zausonia family, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant contains compounds like flavonoids and glycosides, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reduced inflammation and improved immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, and is often used in traditional medicine to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
